title: Streamee Website
summary: UI/UX and visual work for the Streamee web platform, covering interface design, branded assets, campaigns, and developer-ready production files.
problem: The product needed a consistent visual language across app touchpoints and marketing without slowing down release work.

cover.alt: Wireframe of a music app interface with branded content modules

sections.heading: Context
sections.body: Work from the Streamee period at Politis Group.

sections.heading: Challenge
sections.body: Keep product screens, promotional material, and social content aligned while supporting active marketing and product needs.

sections.heading: Process
sections.body: I translated product and marketing needs into UI assets, visual guidelines, original images, illustrations, motion pieces, and handoff-ready files for developers.

sections.heading: Output
sections.body: A consistent set of app visuals, campaign assets, presentation material, and production-ready design files.

sections.heading: Result
sections.body: Design support across product, marketing, and leadership needs, keeping the app and campaign ecosystem visually connected while work moved quickly.
